sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: RAMACO RESOURCES DEADLINE TUESDAY: Bragar Eagel & Squire,
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC), alleging that the company made materially false and misleading statements about its Brook Mine development between July 31, 2025, and October 23, 2025. Investors who purchased Ramaco securities during this period and suffered losses have until March 31, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit claims that Ramaco overstated its mining activity at the Brook Mine, which was reported by Wolfpack Research as a "hoax" with no active work observed.

feed.title: Trimble senior vice president Peter Large announces retirement effective May
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. announced the retirement of Peter Large, Senior Vice President overseeing Strategy, Corporate Development, Corporate Partnerships and Alliances, and the Office of Technology Innovation, effective late May 2026. His retirement is not due to any disagreement and qualifies under the company's Age & Service Equity Vesting Program. This news follows Trimble's strong performance in Q4 2025 and positive analyst ratings from Bernstein SocGen Group and Oppenheimer.

feed.title: Brooks Tractor Incorporated Named Newest Trimble Technology Outlet, Serving Customers in South and Eastern Wisconsin
feed.summary: Trimble announced Brooks Tractor Incorporated as its newest Trimble Technology Outlet. Brooks Tractor will now sell and support Trimble grade control, site positioning systems, and correction services for John Deere earthmoving equipment across its seven locations in Wisconsin. This partnership aims to simplify access to Trimble technology for civil contractors and enhance jobsite productivity and profitability for Brooks Tractor's customers.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts PT on Verizon Communications to $55 From $50, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for Verizon Communications (VZ) to $55 from $50, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment suggests an increased optimistic outlook for Verizon's stock performance by the investment bank.

feed.title: The Amex Platinum Has a Huge Annual Fee. Here's Why It's Still Worth It
feed.summary: The American Express Platinum Card, despite its high $895 annual fee, can offer over $5,000 in potential value in the first year alone through a combination of annual perks and welcome bonus offers. Cardholders can unlock more than $3,500 in annual travel and lifestyle benefits, including hotel credits, digital entertainment credits, and airport lounge access, which can significantly offset the annual cost. Additionally, a substantial welcome bonus, potentially yielding up to 175,000 Membership Rewards points, further enhances the card's value for frequent travelers and high spenders.

feed.title: Provider-insurer contract disputes surge amid denials, downcoding
feed.summary: Public contract disputes between insurance providers and health systems are on the rise, primarily driven by increasing denials and downcoding practices by insurers. The article highlights the growing frequency of these conflicts, suggesting a challenging environment for healthcare providers in their dealings with insurance companies. This trend indicates a strained relationship within the healthcare industry concerning financial compensation and policy interpretation.

feed.title: Why Netflix is turning Major League Baseball’s opening night into a big event
feed.summary: Netflix is making its exclusive entry into baseball broadcasting by streaming MLB's opening day game globally, featuring the Yankees-Giants matchup. This $60-million annual deal is part of Netflix's expanding sports strategy, aiming to attract a global and casual audience beyond dedicated sports fans. The streamer plans to continue leveraging major live events to drive subscriber growth and create "water-cooler conversation."

feed.title: Gilead doubles down on cell therapy: Inside the $7.8bn Arcellx acquisition
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences acquired Arcellx for $7.8 billion to gain rights to anitocabtagene autoleucel (anito-cel), a CAR T-cell therapy for multiple myeloma, projected to reach $658 million in sales by 2032. Anito-cel offers competitive efficacy, faster manufacturing, and a better safety profile compared to existing treatments like Carvykti and Abecma. However, it faces challenges including manufacturing scalability, regulatory scrutiny, and increasingly stringent reimbursement criteria.

feed.title: Competitor Analysis: Evaluating Micron Technology And Competitors In Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment Industry - Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU)
feed.summary: This article provides a competitor analysis of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) within the Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment industry. It highlights that Micron exhibits a stronger financial position with a lower debt-to-equity ratio compared to peers and shows potential undervaluation based on low PE, PB, and PS ratios. The company also demonstrates strong financial performance with high ROE, EBITDA, gross profit, and significant revenue growth.

feed.title: Amcor to launch recyclable airless dispenser for beauty industry
feed.summary: Amcor is set to launch "The Magic One," a new recyclable airless dispensing system for the beauty and personal care industry by early 2027. This dispenser, made entirely of polyolefin, offers multiple output volumes and is designed to comply with EU's PPWR for recyclability, featuring a 96% restitution rate. Production will take place at Amcor’s facility in Lohne, Germany, providing a lightweight and adaptable solution for manufacturers and consumers.

feed.title: Gradient Investments LLC Increases Stock Position in JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM

feed.title: GRIZZLY Containerized Launcher Completes Multiple Live-Fire Launch Tests
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin's new containerized GRIZZLY launcher has successfully completed its first integrated HELLFIRE missile live-fire and vertical-launch tests. Developed in six months, this system offers a cost-efficient, rapid-mobility solution for expeditionary weapon delivery, demonstrating its ability to load and launch missiles from a 10-foot Tricon container. This innovation enhances flexibility and lethality, providing an affordable and easily relocatable launcher to support various military missions.

feed.title: Gryphon Financial Partners LLC Acquires 4,873 Shares of JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM

feed.title: Otis Worldwide stock hits 52-week low at $78.02 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide's stock has hit a 52-week low of $78.02, reflecting a 22.05% decline over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, offering a 2.13% dividend yield. The company recently reported Q4 2025 earnings below expectations but remains focused on innovation and growth, including launching new elevator modernization packages and receiving an "Outperform" rating from Wolfe Research.

feed.title: 3e Network appoints Siyang Hu as vice president By Investing.com
feed.summary: 3e Network Technology Group Limited (NASDAQ:MASK) has appointed Siyang Hu as Vice President, effective this month. Hu brings over 20 years of experience in software, semiconductors, and core technologies, and previously held positions at Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd. and Shanghai Samsung Semiconductor Co., Ltd. His appointment is expected to bolster 3e Network’s technological capabilities and expand its enterprise solutions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley initiates Immix Biopharma stock with overweight rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has initiated coverage on Immix Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ: IMMX) with an overweight rating and a $20 price target, citing the potential of its NXC-201 CAR-T therapy for relapsed/refractory AL amyloidosis. The firm projects a roughly $1 billion-plus market opportunity in the U.S. for this therapy, supported by promising clinical data and FDA Breakthrough Therapy and RMAT designations. Citizens also initiated coverage with a Market Outperform rating and a $23 price target, highlighting NXC-201's strong clinical data.

feed.title: Merck Nears $6 Billion Deal To Buy Terns Pharma: Report
feed.summary: Merck & Co. is reportedly close to a $6 billion all-cash deal to acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, aiming to bolster its oncology pipeline. This strategic acquisition comes as Merck prepares for its top-selling cancer drug, Keytruda, to lose patent protection, which currently accounts for nearly half of its revenue. Terns Pharma is developing an early-stage treatment for chronic myeloid leukemia, which could help offset future revenue losses for Merck.

feed.title: Li Bang International plans 1-for-100 reverse stock split By Investing.com
feed.summary: Li Bang International Corporation Inc. (NASDAQ:LBGJ) has announced a 1-for-100 reverse stock split of its ordinary shares, effective when markets open on Thursday. This action aims to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. Following the split, the company's Class A ordinary shares will continue trading under the symbol LBGJ with a new CUSIP number.
